title: Amplified Minecraft
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4615627561a73e65f0929e15882b4b9eee1ff88.png)

# Features

✓ Vanilla Style Experience

✓ Dozens Of New Mobs (Alex's Mobs, Upgrade Aquatic, Atmospheric)

✓ High Optimization On Forge (Rubidium)

✓ Better Multiplayer (Essential, Lootr)

✓ Dozens Of New Foods (Farmer's Delight, Alex's Delight, Abnormals Delight)

✓ Improved 3rd Person & Player Animations (Shoulder Surfing Reloaded, Animation Overhaul)
